productDisplayName: Chhota Bheem Kids Boys Lets Rock Green T-shirt
description: Composition Green and black T-shirt made of 100% polyester, has short sleeves, round neck and fully printed front Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash warm Tumble dry low Do not dry clean Cool iron on reverse; do not iron on print It's all fun and games in this short sleeved T-shirt from Green Gold's chhota bheem collection. The cute picture of the Chhota Bheem characters make this the perfect tee for any child who loves music. Crafted from shiny polyester, this top has a sporty look. Team it with denim trousers or shorts.
